papers.title: Proteomics of paired pancreatic tissue and serum samples reveals biomarkers for pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma

specimens_described.storage: matched tissue + serum (n=29 pairs) + 53 additional serum; storage conditions in methods

papers.institution: Lund University / CEBMMS (Center for Biobank, Epidemiology, and Biobanking)
papers.access_route: Lund University Biobank (CEBMMS) formal application; Swedish regional ethics approval (Region Skane); MTA required
papers.notes: n=29 matched PDAC tissue+serum pairs + 53 standalone serum. CEBMMS is a named biobank with established access process. Proteomics context = strong pre-analytical documentation expected. Treat n=29 as the matched pairs count, n=82 total serum-accessible.

papers.title: The Barts Pancreas Tissue Bank: a repository of pancreatic cancer biospecimens with linked clinical data
papers.institution: Barts Cancer Institute / Barts Pancreas Tissue Bank (BPTB)
papers.access_route: BPTB formal access request via Barts Cancer Institute; NHS Research Ethics Committee approval; data sharing agreement; UK Biobank-style governance
papers.notes: n=340 PDAC with the broadest specimen diversity in this bundle: FFPE + serum + plasma + urine + linked clinical data. BPTB is a named, published biobank with established governance. PMC-indexed = high recall. This is the strongest overall match for the bundle's FFPE+serum requirement at scale.

papers.title: Serum proteomics and FFPE IHC validation identifies diagnostic markers for pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma

specimens_described.storage: serum at -80C + FFPE for IHC validation

papers.institution: Multicenter (institution not uniquely identified in title — verify from full text)
papers.access_route: Corresponding author contact; institutional ethics approval; specimen availability unclear without full-text review
papers.notes: n=120 PDAC serum + FFPE IHC validation. Serum and FFPE present but not matched per-patient (FFPE used for IHC validation cohort, not paired with serum). PMC-indexed (PMC8287202) = reliable retrieval. Exact institution requires full-text verification. Theranostics journal = likely Chinese or international multicenter.

expected_retrievable_institutions: Barts Cancer Institute / Barts Pancreas Tissue Bank
notes: Two strong named-biobank targets (CEBMMS Lund and BPTB Barts) and one multicenter paper requiring institution disambiguation. Pipeline should retrieve on queries combining pancreatic cancer + FFPE + serum + biobank OR PDAC + proteomics + biospecimen. BPTB (PMC9818842) is the highest-scale and broadest-specimen-type match. Lund/CEBMMS (PMID 38029961) has the strongest paired tissue+serum protocol documentation. Third paper (PMC8287202) is secondary — institution must be verified from full text before treating as a sourcing lead. PMID 38029961 is 2023 and may be slower to appear in all indexes; europepmc recommended for confirmation.
